payload.answer: I can help rewrite the memory, but the replacement text is ambiguous: “He prefers the other one” does not identify who “he” is or what “the other one” refers to.
repair_options: Rewrite the existing memory exactly as: “He prefers the other one.”
Clarify who “he” refers to, then rewrite the memory.
Clarify what “the other one” refers to, then rewrite the memory.
Clarify both the person and the preference target before rewriting.
